title: LG Electronics India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: LG Electronics India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
LG Electronics India has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About LG Electronics India:
LG Electronics India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LG Electronics India!
